# Code of Conduct 

## The point
This is an open-source chess engine project — it is currently in very early stages. Keep things civil.

## What that means
- Be respectful.
- If you disagree with someone, argue about the ideas, not the person.
- Assume good faith.

## If you don't
If someone chooses to disregard this and disrespect those around them (vandalism, disrespect, trolling), I will step in. Because I want to write code, not run a legal firm, I will be quick to take action if necessary.

This isn't legal advice, just simple guidelines for contributing to a project.

— Chestertonian
